description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage containing seven jobs, each using its own Docker image. In the alpine_test_module job (image alpine:3.6) run: apk add --update bash curl git; git clone https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space.git; cd space && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which busybox; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. In the arch_test_module job (image finalduty/archlinux:monthly) run: pacman -Sy --noconfirm curl git; git clone https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space.git; cd space && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. In the centos_test_module job (image centos:latest) run: yum -y update && yum -y install curl git which; git clone https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space.git; cd space && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. In the debianjessie_curl_test_module job (image debian:jessie) run: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl; curl -O https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space/repository/archive.tar.gz?ref=master && mkdir -p ./space_install && tar xzvf "archive.tar.gz?ref=master" -C ./space_install --strip-components=1 && cd ./space_install && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. In the debianjessie_test_module job (image debian:jessie) run: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl git; git clone https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space.git; cd space && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. In the debianjessie_wget_test_module job (image debian:jessie) run: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq wget; wget https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space/repository/archive.tar.gz?ref=master && mkdir -p ./space_install && tar xzvf "archive.tar.gz?ref=master" -C ./space_install --strip-components=1 && cd ./space_install && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. In the debianlatest_test_module job (image debian:latest) run: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl git; git clone https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space.git; cd space && ./space /install/ && cd ..; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which space; bash --version; space -V; space -f ./Spacefile.yaml /_dep_install/ -v4. All jobs run in the test stage with no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
